goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'sunday' and should 'leave after 09:45'.
The train should go to 'cambridge' and should depart from 'london liverpool street'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time' and 'train ID'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'college'.
Make sure you get 'postcode', 'address', and 'area'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
